figures.caption: Table 1: Main results of personalized product reranking on “Electronics” category data. “Within-category products” adds products from the same category as auxiliary context, while “Within + cross-category products” further includes products from other categories. “Base-extractor memory” uses the base extractor (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct) without RL training, “GPT-5.2 memory” uses GPT-5.2 for memory extraction, and “MEMRERANK” uses our RL-trained Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct as memory extractor. “think tag” prompts explicit reasoning before final selection. Within-category and cross-category product pools are both set to 10.
Figure 9: Within-category Shopping Preference Memory Extraction Prompt v1

Figure 1: Impact of different memory extraction prompts on downstream personalized product reranking accuracy. “Within-category” denotes extracting only within-category shopping preference memory, while “Within- and crosscategory” denotes extracting both within-category and crosscategory shopping preference memory. For each setting, v1 uses a fixed set of suggested aspects, v2 allows the extractor to freely discover aspects from purchase history, and v3 combines light aspect guidance with flexible aspect discovery and explicit evidence grounding. Blue bars show the base extractor without training, and red bars show our trained extractor.
Figure 8: Reranking Prompt with Memory and Think Tag

Figure 12: Dataset statistics. The top figure shows the number of benchmark instances for each target category. The bottom figure compares the average lengths of within-category and cross-category purchase histories. Cross-category history is consistently much longer, motivating separate modeling of within-category and cross-category preference memory.

Figure 2: Impact of purchase history length on downstream personalized product reranking accuracy without explicit memory extraction. The vertical axis varies the number of within-category products, and the horizontal axis varies the number of cross-category products.
Figure 11: Within-category Shopping Preference Memory Extraction Prompt v3
